mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, school, student_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (id, username, password, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, school, student_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{school}, #{studentId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_user
username = #{username}, password = #{password}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar = #{avatar}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, gender = #{gender}, school = #{school}, student_id = #{studentId}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_user SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
